_description: Slack Block Kit: Leave request confirmation sent to employee after submission
_notes: This message is sent as a DM to the employee after successful submission. Shows the full approval chain the request will follow.

text.text: :white_check_mark: Your leave request has been submitted and is now pending approval.

*Approval Chain:*
:arrow_right: Step 1: Tom Park (Direct Manager)
:white_circle: Step 2: Sarah Admin (HR)

elements.text: :clock3: You'll be notified when each step is completed. | <https://app.leaveflow.com/requests/REQ-2026-0147|View in LeaveFlow>
